statics.description: CARDNAME can't attack unless defending player controls an Island.

triggers.description: Whenever CARDNAME blocks or becomes blocked by a creature that has been dealt damage this turn, CARDNAME gets +2/+0 and gains trample until end of turn.
Whenever CARDNAME blocks or becomes blocked by a creature that has been dealt damage this turn, CARDNAME gets +2/+0 and gains trample until end of turn.
When you control no Islands, sacrifice CARDNAME.
